Play style: Hold, play on turn when Player chooses and stays as a Player property
Rules and function: When Guard is played, Player gains the ability to move the Robber once just like when a 7 is rolled, thereby blocking the new location from giving Resources, and earning the ability to steal one Resource from a Player with a Village or Estate adjacent ot the new Centre location.  Playing a Guard adds 1 to Army Count; there is a Largest Army Bonus.

Play style: Effective immediately, but invisible to the rest of the Players
Rules and function: Receiving this card immediately adds 1 Point to the Player, but this addition is invisible to the rest of the Players, who only know that a Development Card is being held, but not its function.

Play style: Hold, play on turn when Player chooses and then immediately goes to Discard pile
Rules and function: Gives the Player the ability to add 2 Roads to the Board for free, but following Road construction / adjacency rules (at least one Vertex of the Road must be a Vertex owned by the Player).

Play style: Hold, play on turn when Player chooses and then immediately goes to Discard pile
Rules and function: Gives the Player the ability to add 2 free Resources to the Resource hold; can be two of the same or two different types of Resources.

Play style: Hold, play on turn when Player chooses and then immediately goes to Discard pile
Rules and function: Player names a Resource type, and all of that Resource type owned by other Players is given up by them and transferred to this Player.  Player cannot see what is held by Opponents until the transferred Resources are received.

Play style: Hold, play on turn when Player chooses and then immediately goes to Discard pile
Rules and function: Player names one other Player and Resources are completely swapped between them.  Can be played even if the current Player has 0 Resources.

Play style: Hold, play on turn when Player chooses and then immediately goes to Discard pile
Rules and function: Player chooses one of their existing Villages, and this upgrades to an Estate for free, earning 1 point.  Can only be played if Player owns at least 1 Village.

Play style: Hold, play on turn when Player chooses and then immediately goes to Discard pile
Rules and function: On this turn, Player may trade as much as they wish with the Bank 2:1 (Player gives up 2 of the same of any Resource for 1 of any other Resource).  This functionality will be enabled once trading is implemented in full, and for now this Card can be purchased but CANNOT BE PLAYED.
